full_text:
Teng Zhou 滕胄
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Teng Zhou (滕胄). Served Liu Yao and then the Sun family. Skilled at literary composition. Teng Zhou was affiliated with Liu Yao and the Wu Kingdom.
